name: Hush Puppies 6pc
notes: Deep-fried cornmeal balls. Classic southern side dish.

name: Plantains Fried
notes: Sweet ripe plantains (maduros) or green (tostones) fried. Sweet version is higher sugar.

name: Doner Kebab Wrap
notes: Thinly sliced rotisserie lamb-beef in flatbread with salad and sauce. Late-night food staple.

name: Lahmacun
notes: Thin crispy flatbread topped with minced meat, vegetables, herbs. Turkish 'pizza'. Very thin base.

name: Pierogi 6pc
notes: 6 potato-cheese filled dumplings. Pan-fried in butter adds 50-80 cal. Boiled is lighter.

name: Pupusa 2pc
notes: 2 thick corn tortillas stuffed with cheese, beans, or pork. Served with curtido (pickled slaw).

name: Empanada Beef 2pc
notes: 2 deep-fried beef empanadas. Baked version is ~340 cal for 2. Chicken empanadas are similar.

name: Chai Tea Latte
notes: Spiced chai concentrate with steamed milk. Very high sugar from chai concentrate.

name: Protein Smoothie
notes: Protein powder, banana, berries, milk or yogurt. Varies hugely. With peanut butter add 190 cal.

name: Frozen Lemonade
notes: Large frozen lemonade. Extremely high sugar. Basically sugar and lemon juice.

name: Chicken Thigh Bone-In
notes: With skin. Skinless is ~160 cal. Dark meat has more flavor and fat than breast.

name: Chicken Wing
notes: Single whole wing (flat + drumette). Fried buffalo wing is ~130 cal. Sauced adds more.

name: Canned Tuna in Water
notes: 5oz can drained. In oil is ~200 cal. Very high protein, very lean. Classic bodybuilding food.

name: Spaghetti Cooked
notes: Plain cooked spaghetti without sauce. With marinara add 70 cal. With meat sauce add 150 cal.

name: Penne Pasta Cooked
notes: Same calories as spaghetti. Shape doesn't change nutrition.

name: Ciabatta Roll
notes: Italian bread roll. Larger than standard dinner roll.

name: Flour Tortilla 10 inch
notes: 10-inch flour tortilla for burritos/wraps. Smaller 8-inch is ~140 cal. Corn tortilla is ~60 cal.

name: Croissant Plain
notes: Standard butter croissant. Very flaky and buttery. With filling (chocolate, almond): 350-420 cal.

name: Couscous Cooked
notes: Plain cooked couscous. Technically tiny pasta. Pearl couscous (Israeli) is similar.

name: Edamame Shelled
notes: Shelled soybeans. Very high protein for a plant. In pod is same nutrition, just harder to eat.

name: Brussels Sprouts Roasted
notes: Roasted with olive oil. Steamed without oil: 56 cal. Oil and seasoning double the calories.

name: Cooked Lentils
notes: Cooked brown/green lentils. Extremely high fiber and protein. One of the most nutritious foods.

name: Black Bean Soup
notes: Hearty black bean soup. High fiber and protein. With sour cream and cheese add 100 cal.

name: Mixed Berries
notes: Mix of strawberries, blueberries, raspberries, blackberries. Low calorie and high in antioxidants.

name: Medjool Dates
notes: 2 large Medjool dates. Natural energy food. Popular in smoothies and energy balls.

name: Butter Pat
notes: Single restaurant butter pat. 1 tablespoon (3 pats) = 100 cal.

name: Peanut Butter 2 Tbsp
notes: Standard 2-tablespoon serving. Very calorie-dense. PB2 powdered is 60 cal per 2 tbsp.

name: Cream Cheese 2 Tbsp
notes: Regular cream cheese. Neufchatel (1/3 less fat) is 70 cal. Standard bagel schmear is ~3 tbsp.

name: Hummus 2 Tbsp
notes: Standard 2-tablespoon serving. Often eaten with 10-15 baby carrots (35 cal) or pita (170 cal).

name: Guacamole 2 Tbsp
notes: Standard 2-tablespoon serving. Healthy fats from avocado. With chips: +140 cal per 1oz chips.

name: Salsa 2 Tbsp
notes: Fresh salsa or jarred. Very low calorie dip option.

name: Tortilla Chips 1oz
notes: Standard 1oz serving of tortilla chips. Restaurant basket is typically 3-4 servings.

name: Dark Chocolate Square
notes: 70% dark chocolate. Higher cacao = slightly fewer calories and less sugar.

name: Reese's Peanut Butter Cups
notes: Published data. Standard 2-cup package.

name: Frozen Pizza Whole
notes: 1/3 of a standard frozen pizza. Whole pizza is ~1140 cal. Rising crust varieties are higher.

name: Hot Pocket Pepperoni
notes: Published data. Standard Hot Pocket. Lean Pocket is ~260 cal.

name: Frozen Burrito Bean Cheese
notes: Standard frozen bean and cheese burrito. Beef varieties: ~320 cal.

name: Frozen Chicken Tenders 5pc
notes: 5 frozen breaded chicken tenders baked. Air-fried is slightly less. Published Tyson data.
